description: Crypto market data — prices, market caps, OHLC, historical, exchanges, NFT floors, derivatives. Free Demo tier: 30 req/min, 10k credits/month, 50+ endpoints.

simple-price.notes: Cheap fast price lookup. Required: ?ids=bitcoin,ethereum&vs_currencies=usd,brl. Optional: include_market_cap, include_24hr_vol, include_24hr_change.

coins-list.notes: All ~17k coins with id/symbol/name. Use to map symbols → ids before /simple/price.

coins-markets.notes: Market data ranked by mcap. Required: ?vs_currency=usd. Optional: ids, category, order, per_page (max 250), price_change_percentage.

coin-by-id.notes: Full coin profile: description, links, community/dev stats, market data. :id is the CoinGecko id (bitcoin, ethereum, solana).

coin-history.notes: Historical snapshot at a specific date. Required: ?date=DD-MM-YYYY (note European format).

trending.notes: Top 7 trending coins, NFTs, categories on CoinGecko in last 24h.

global.notes: Total market cap, BTC dominance, active cryptos, exchanges count.
